title: The One With the Evil Orthodontist

lines.text: Monica and Rachel's, everyone is there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't believe you would actually say that. I would much rather be Mr.Peanut than Mr.Salty.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No way! Mr.Salty is a sailor, all right, he's got to be, like, thetoughest snack there is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know, you don't wanna mess with corn nuts. They're craaazy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking out of the window) Oh my God. You guys! You gotta come see this! There's some creep out there with a telescope!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe it! He's looking right at us!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, that is so sick.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I feel violated. And not in a good way.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How can people do that?... (All but Phoebe walk away from the window in disgust.) Oh, you guys, look! Ugly Naked Guy got gravity boots!
Opening Credits
Central Perk, everyone but Rachel is there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I am telling you, years from now, schoolchildren will study it as one of the greatest first dates of all time. It was unbelievable! We could totally be ourselves, we didn't have to play any games...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So have you called her yet?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let her know I like her? What are you, insane? (The girls make disgusted noises.) It's the next day! How needy do I want to seem? (To the guys) I'm right, right?

lines.speaker: Joey and Ross
lines.text: Oh, yeah. Yeah. Let her dangle.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't believe my parents are actually pressuring me to find one of you people.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, God, just do it! (Grabbing the phone.) Call her! Stop being so testosteroney!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Which, by the way, is the real San Francisco treat. (Calls her, then hurriedly hangs up.) I got her machine.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Her answer machine?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, interestingly enough her leaf blower picked up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, uh, why didn't you say anything?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, no-no-no-no. Last time I left a spontaneous message I ended up using the phrase "Yes indeedy-o."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look look! It's Rachel and Barry. No, don't everybody look at once!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, okay, what's going on?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, they're just talking...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, well, does he look upset? Does he look like he was just told to shove anything?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no actually, he's smiling.. and... Oh my God, don't do that!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? What? What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That man across the street just kicked that pigeon! (Rachel enters.) Oh!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (bluffing) And basically, that's how a bill becomes a law.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Oh!... Right!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Rach!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How'd it go?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know, it was, uh.. it was actually really great. He took me to lunch at the Russian Tea Room, and I had that chicken, where y'know you poke it and all the butter squirts out...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Not a good day for birds...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Then we took a walk down to Bendall's, and I told him not to, but he got me a little bottle of Chanel...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's nice... now, was that before or after you told him to stop calling, stop sending you flowers and to generally leave you alone, hmm?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right,.. well,.. we never actually got to that... Oh, it was just so nice to see him again, y'know? It was comfortable, it was familiar... it was just nice!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's, that's nice twice!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel, what's going on? I mean isn't this the same Barry who you left at the altar?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Duh, where've you been?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, but it was different with him today! And he wasn't, like, Orthodontist Guy, y'know? I mean, we had fun! Is there anything wrong with that?
Ross 'prompts' Chandler by hitting him on the arm.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I have my reasons.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, how about the fact that he's engaged to another woman, who just happens to be your ex-best friend?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right. All right, all right, all right, all right, I know it's stupid! I will go see him this afternoon, and I will just put an end to it!
Barry's Office, the post-coital Barry and Rachel are recovering on the chair.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow... Wow!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not crazy, right? I mean, it was never like that.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Nooo, it wasn't.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ooh, and it's so nice having this little sink here...
Monica and Rachel's, everyone is there except Rachel.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (on phone, reading from a script) Oh, Danielle! I wasn't expecting the machine... Give me a call when you get a chance. (Rattles some dishes) Bye-bye. (Hangs up.) Oh God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's what you've been working on for the past two hours?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I've been honing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What was with the dishes?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, uh.. I want her to think I might be in a restaurant.. y'know? I might have some kind of life, like I haven't been sitting around here honing for the past few hours.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking out the window) Look look! He's doing it again, the guy with the telescope!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! (Walks to the window) Go away! (Gesturing.) Stop looking in here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Great, now he's waving back.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man, we gotta do something about that guy. This morning, I caught him looking into our apartment. It creeps me out! I feel like I can't do stuff!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What kinda stuff?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Will you grow up? I'm not talking about sexy stuff, but, like, when I'm cooking naked.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You cook naked?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, toast, oatmeal... nothing that spatters.
A pause as they look at Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What are you looking at me for? I didn't know that.
Barry's Office, Rachel and Barry are getting dressed.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's just... Oh, Barry, this was not good.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: No, it was. It was very very good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, what about Mindy?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Oh, way, way better than Mindy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, not that, I mean, what about you and Mindy?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Well, if you want, I'll just-I'll just break it off with her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. No-no-no-no, no. I mean, don't do that. Not, I mean not for me.

lines.speaker: Bernice
lines.text: (over intercom) Dr. Farber, Bobby Rush is here for his adjustment.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: (into intercom) Thanks, Bernice. (To Rachel) Let's go away this weekend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, Barry..! Come on, this is all way too..

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: We can, we can go to Aruba! When I went there on what would have been our honeymoon, it was, uh... it was really nice. You would've liked it.
Pause as Rachel realises...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I had a bra.
Barry finds it draped on a cupboard and gives it to Rachel, they kiss as Bobby enters.

lines.speaker: Bobby
lines.text: Hey, Dr. Farber.
Rachel and Barry quickly split and pretend Barry is examining Rachel's mouth.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: All right Miss Green, everything looks fine... Yep, I think we're starting to see some real progress here.
Bobby looks on, deadpan.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Bobby
lines.text: I'm twelve, I'm not stupid.
Rachel glares at him.
Monica and Rachel's, Chandler enters clutching his phone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Can I use your phone?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah.. uh, but for future reference, that thing in your hand can also be used as a phone.
Chandler dials his own phone and it rings.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, it's working! Why isn't she calling me back?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Maybe she never got your message.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know, if you want, you can call her machine, and if she has a lot of beeps, that means she probably didn't get her messages yet.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'don't think that makes me seem a little...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...desperate, needy, pathetic?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah, you obviously saw my personal ad.
He calls and quickly hangs up.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How many beeps?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She answered.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'see, this is where you'd use that 'hello' word we talked about.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm not gonna talk to her, she obviously got my message and is choosing not to call me. Now I'm needy and snubbed. God, I miss just being needy.
Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey! Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How'd he take it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Pretty well, actually... (Wandering into the kitchen.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (wandering in after her) Uh, Rach... how come you have dental floss in your hair?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, do I?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh huh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (in a low voice) We ended up having sex in his chair.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You had sex in his chair?!... I said that a little too loudly, didn't I?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You-you had what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Sex in his chair.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What, uh... what were you thinking?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know! I mean, we still care about each other. There's a history there. 'S'like you and Carol.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! No no, it is nothing like me and Carol!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Please. If she said to you, "Ross, I want you on this couch, right here, right now," what would you say?
Ross flounders.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: If it helps, I could slide over.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's, it's, it's, uh, a totally diferent situation! It's, it's apples and oranges, it's, it's orthodontists and lesbi- I gotta go.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Where are you going?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (leaving) I just have to go, all right? Do I need a reason? Huh? I mean I have things to do with my life, I have a jam packed schedule, and I am late- for keeping up with it. Okay?
Ross exits, a phone rings, and Chandler dives for his phone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hello? Hello?
Rachel picks up their phone and the ringing stops.  As she talks on the phone, an elaborate visual gag is spun out which is too difficult to describe in words.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (on phone) Hello?(Listens) Mindy! Hi! Hey, how are you? (Listens) Yes, yes, I've heard, congratulations, that is so great. (Listens) Really? (Listens) Oh. (Listens) Okay. Okay, well I'm working tomorrow, but if you want you can, you can, you can come by and... (Listens) Okay... (Listens) Great... (Listens) Great... (Listens) All right, so I'll, so I'll see you tomorrow! (Listens) Okay.. (Listens) Okay... (Listens) Bye. (Hangs up and sits down heavily.) Oh God. Oh God. Oh God.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So how's Mindy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, she wants to see me tomorrow...Oh, she sounded really weird, I gotta call Barry... (Does so, on phone) Hi, it's me, I just.. Mindy!! Mindy! Hi! No, I figured that's where you'd be!
Commercial Break
Monica and Rachel's, the next morning.  Chandler is sitting and staring at his phone.  Monica enters and creeps up next to Chandler.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Brrrrrrr!
Chandler clutches at his phone before realising.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hell is filled with people like you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) He's back! The peeper's back!
Rachel enters from her room.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (ducking) Get down!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Get down?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...And boogie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thanks, but I gotta go to work and get my eyes scratched out by Mindy.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Relax. Y'know, she may not even know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Please. I haven't heard from her in seven months, and now she calls me? I mean, what else is it about? Oh! She was my best friend, you guys! We went to camp together... she taught me how to kiss..

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (intrigued) Yeah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And now, y'know, I'm like... I'm like the other woman! I feel so..

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: ..Naughty!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right, I'll see you guys later...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, hold up, I'll walk out with you. Now, Rach, when she taught you to kiss, you were at camp, and.. were you wearing any kinda little uniform, or- (Rachel exits and slams the door in his face.) That's fine, yeah...
Joey exits.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, I'm gonna go to the bathroom. Will you watch my phone?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why don't you just take it with you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, we haven't been on a second date, she needs to hear me pee?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why don't you just call her?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't call her, I left a message! I have some pride.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! (Calls) Danielle, hi! It's, uh, it's Chandler! (Listens) I'm fine. Uh, listen, I don't know if you tried to call me, because, uh, idiot that I am, I accidentally shut off my phone. (Listens) Oh, uh, okay, that's fine, that's great. (Listens) Okay. (Puts down the phone.) (to Monica) She's on the other line, she's gonna call me back. (He starts doing a little jig.) She's on the other line, she's gonna call me back, she's on the other line, gonna call me back...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Don't you have to pee?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: 'S'why I'm dancing...
Central Perk, Rachel is serving coffee as Mindy enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Mindy.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Hey, you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, you.... So, what's up?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Um.. we should really be sitting for this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sure we should... So.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Now, I know things've been weird lately, but you're like my oldest friend in the world... Except for maybe Laurie Schaffer, who I don't talk to anywhere, 'cause she's all bitter now that she lost the weight and it turns out she doesn't have a pretty face. ....Okay, I'm just gonna ask you this once, and I want a straight answer.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Will you be my maid of honour?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Oh that's so great!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Was that all you wanted to ask me?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: That's all!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhhh!! (Mindy starts to sob.) ...What? What?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: That's not all.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh sure it is!

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Oh no, it isn't! No! I think Barry is seeing someone in the city.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Um, what- what would make you think that?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Well, ever since we announced the engagement, he's been acting really weird, and then last night, he came home smelling like Chanel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (draws back) Really. Mindy, if it'll make you feel any better, when I was engaged to him he went through a whole weird thing too.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Oh God! You see, that's what I was afraid of!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? What's what you were afraid of?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Okay, okay... when Barry was engaged to you, he and I...kind of... had a little thing on the side.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: I know. I know, and when he proposed to me, everyone said "Don't do it, he's just gonna do to you what he did to Rachel," and now I feel so stupid.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh... Oh, Mindy, you are so stupid. Oh, we are both so stupid.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (offers her arm to Mindy and she sniffs) Smell familiar?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Oh no.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I am so sorry.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: No me, I am so sorry...
They hug and Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (watches them for a while) Oh my.
Monica and Rachel's, Phoebe and Ross are doing a crossword, Monica is cooking, and Chandler is still staring at his phone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Four letters: "Circle or hoop".

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ring dammit, ring!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey, you know our phone's not working?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I tried to call you from the coffee shop, and there was no answer.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (investigating) I turned it off. Mother of God, I turned it off!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Just like you told her you did! (Chandler glares at her.) ... Just pointing out the irony.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, so listen, I went across the street and talked to the doorman- I got the peeper's name! Can I use the phone?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nngghhh!!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Monica) Can I use your phone? (On phone) Yeah, the number for a Sidney Marks, please.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: "Heating device."

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Radiator.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Five letters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rdtor.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone) Yeah, is Sidney there? (Listens) Oh, this is? (To the gang) Sidney's a woman.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So she's a woman! So what?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Yeah, so what? (On phone) Look, I live across the street, (walking to the window) and I know all about you and your little telescope, and I don't appreciate it, okay? (Listens) Yeah, I can see you right now! (Listens) Hello! (Listens) If I wanna walk around my apartment in my underwear, I shouldn't have to feel like-(Listens)-Thank you, but... that's not really the point... (Listens) The point is that... (Listens) Mostly free weights, but occasionally..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone) Yeah, my neighbor... (Listens) Yeah, the brunette... (to Monica) She says you looked very pretty the other day in the green dress.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The green dress? Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, she said you looked like Ingrid Bergman that day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (waves dismissively to Sidney) Nooo!
Barry's Office, Barry is preparing his tools alone as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey. Got a second?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Sure, sure. Come on... (Mindy enters) ...in...

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Hello, sweetheart.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Uh... uh... what're'you... what're'you guys doing here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh, we are here to break up with you.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Both of you?

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Basically, we think you're a horrible human being, and bad things should happen to you.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: I'm sorry... I'm sorry, God, I am so sorry, I'm an idiot, I was weak, I couldn't help myself! Whatever I did, I only did because I love you so much!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh- which one of us are you talking to there, Barr?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: ....Mindy. Mindy, of course Mindy, it was always Mindy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Even when we were having sex in that chair?

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: (to Mindy) I swear, whatever I was doing, I was always thinking of you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Please! During that second time you couldn't have picked her out of a lineup!

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: (to Rachel) You did it twice?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, the first time didn't really count... I mean, y'know, 's'Barry.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: (to Mindy) Sweetheart, just gimme- gimme another chance, okay, we'll start all over again. We'll go back to Aruba.

lines.speaker: Bernice
lines.text: (over intercom) Dr. Farber, we've got a bit of an emergency here...Jason Costalano is choking on his retainer.

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: Oh God... (Into intercom) I'll be right there, Bernice. (to Mindy) Look, please, please don't go anywhere, okay? I'll be, I'll be right back.
Barry exits

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay, we'll be here! Hating you! Did you see how he was sweating when he walked out of there? Listen honey, if I'm hogging the ball too much you just jump right in there and take a couple punches because I'm telling you, this feels great.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Yeah... I'm pretty sure I'm still gonna marry him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you talking about?! Mindy, the guy is the devil! He's Satan in a smock!

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: Look, I know he's not perfect, but the truth is, at the end of the day, I still really wanna be Mrs. Dr. Barry Farber, D.D.S.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God.

lines.speaker: Mindy
lines.text: I hope you can find some way to be happy for me. And I hope you'll still be my maid of honor...?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And I hope Barry doesn't kill you and eat you in Aruba.
Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Rachel are there.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Y'know, ever since I ran out on Barry at the wedding, I have wondered whether I made the right choice. And now I know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Aww... (They hug)
Joey enters and looks on approvingly.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Big day.
Closing Credits
Central Perk, everyone is there.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, I'll give you this, Mr. Peanut is a better dresser. I mean he's got the monocle, he's got the top hat...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You know he's gay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just wanna clarify this: are you outing Mr. Peanut?

lines.speaker: Danielle
lines.text: (entering) Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Danielle! Hi! Uh- everybody, this is Danielle, Danielle, everybody.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hi. Hi.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Danielle
lines.text: Well, I've been calling you, but it turns out I had your number wrong. And when I finally got the right one from Information, there was no answer. So I thought I'd just come down here, and make sure you were okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...I'm, I'm okay.

lines.speaker: Danielle
lines.text: Listen uh, maybe we could get together later?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That sounds good. I'll call you- or you call me, whatever...

lines.speaker: Danielle
lines.text: You got it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Danielle
lines.text: G'bye, everybody.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Whoo-hoo!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, there you go!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Second date!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: ...I dunno.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You don't know?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, she seems very nice and everything, but that whole thing about her coming all the way down here, just to see if I was okay? I mean,... how needy is that?
They all groan and hit him..
End
